notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Email and system notification logs including expiration warnings and alerts.
notifications.history_subtitle: Log of automatically dispatched HTML alert emails and system notifications.
notifications.empty_subtitle: There are no notification logs currently recorded in the database.
notifications.telegram_desc: Configure your personal Telegram Chat ID to receive automated alerts.
notifications.telegram_guide_step1: 1. Search for our bot @{{username}} on Telegram and click Start.
notifications.telegram_guide_step2: 2. Search for @userinfobot or @GetMyChatID_Bot to find your personal Chat ID, start it, and copy the numeric ID.
notifications.telegram_guide_step3: 3. Paste your numeric Chat ID in the field and click Save Settings.

auth.quote: One account goes down. The rest keep spending. Compartmentalized agency accounts — no shared pool, no cascade.
auth.copyright: © 2026 BoostBuddy Networks Inc. Manual Client Access Portal. All rights reserved.
auth.login_desc: Enter your client email below to access your active browser profiles.
auth.register_desc: Create your client subscription account to purchase browser proxies.
auth.reset_success: Password successfully reset! Please sign in with your new password.
auth.pending_approval_login_error: Your account is pending administrator approval. You cannot log in until an admin approves your account.
auth.deactivated_login_error: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact support.
auth.register_pending_success: Registration successful! Your account is pending administrator approval before you can log in.

forgot_password.quote: Security and client profile mapping are paramount. Restoring credentials quickly protects ongoing campaigns and preserves account standing.
forgot_password.copyright: © 2026 BoostBuddy Networks Inc. Manual Client Access Portal. All rights reserved.
forgot_password.reset_desc: Provide your client registration email below, and we will send a password reset validation link.
forgot_password.email_dispatched_desc: We have sent a simulated password recovery email to {{email}}. Check your local mailbox logs to continue.

reset_password.quote: Establish a new password to secure your account. Strong and unique passwords keep your campaigns and proxy assignments private.
reset_password.copyright: © 2026 BoostBuddy Networks Inc. Manual Client Access Portal. All rights reserved.
reset_password.create_desc: Type your new secure account password below to finish restoring access.
reset_password.success_redirect: Your password has been reset successfully! Redirecting you...

admin_layout.access_denied: Access denied. You must be an administrator.

admin_layout.subtitle: Management Panel

client_layout.auth_error: Authentication error. Please refresh the page.

client_layout.subtitle: Client Area

profile_card.banner_change_requested: Change requested - Waiting for admin to assign new profile
profile_card.banner_expired: Profile Expired! Please renew to reactivate access.

billing_form.title: Billing Information
billing_form.description: Update your billing and invoice details.

client_dashboard.title: Assigned Profiles
client_dashboard.subtitle: Access credentials and instructions for your manually managed IXBrowser profiles.
client_dashboard.exp_warning_desc: You have {{count}} browser profiles close to expiration. Click the Renew button on the profile card to prevent service interruption.
client_dashboard.instructions_desc: Profiles must be opened directly inside your local IXBrowser application. Copy the Profile ID or Group Name below and use it in your IXBrowser app to find, import, and launch the profiles manually.
client_dashboard.no_profiles_desc: You currently have no browser profiles assigned to your client account. Go to the payments store to buy a service.
client_dashboard.banner_change_requested: Change requested - Waiting for admin to assign new profile
client_dashboard.banner_expired: Profile Expired! Please renew to reactivate access.
client_dashboard.alert_requested_text: You'll be notified when a new profile is assigned.
client_dashboard.alert_launch_text: Open IXBrowser App and import this profile ID manually.

client_pending.title: Awaiting Admin Activation
client_pending.desc: Thank you for registering with BoostBuddy! Your account has been created, and your welcome email has been dispatched.
client_pending.step_1: • Wait for an administrator to review and activate your account.
client_pending.step_2: • Once activated, click Check Status below to enter the portal.

client_billing.title: Billing Settings
client_billing.subtitle: Keep your billing info up to date for invoices and recurring receipt logs.
client_billing.section_desc: These details will be stamped on your generated billing statements.

client_invoices.title: Invoice History
client_invoices.subtitle: View and download billing statements uploaded manually by the Administrator.
client_invoices.no_invoices_desc: Any invoice PDFs uploaded manually by the admin for your accounts will appear here.
client_invoices.modal_footer_thanks: Thank you for your business! BoostBuddy - Manual Browser Profiles Portal.

client_payments.title: Payments & Services
client_payments.subtitle: Purchase new clean proxy browser profiles or view your full transaction history.
client_payments.no_services: No active services are currently configured in the database.
client_payments.manual_assignment_warning: Requires manual profile allocation by admin after successful checkout.
client_payments.no_transactions_desc: You haven't made any purchases or renewals yet.

checkout.invalid_desc: The checkout link appears to be broken or expired. Please return to the dashboard and try again.
checkout.secure_checkout_desc: You will be redirected to Stripe to securely complete your payment.
checkout.stripe_processing_badge: Payments are processed securely by Stripe

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.desc: Thank you for your payment. Your transaction was completed successfully, and your dashboard has been updated.

admin_dashboard.title: Admin Statistics
admin_dashboard.subtitle: Monitor active profiles, expiring browser packages, and manage pending customer registrations.
admin_dashboard.alert_desc: There are {{count}} browser profile subscription(s) expiring within 7 days. Client notifications have been dispatched.
admin_dashboard.pending_empty: No client accounts are currently awaiting approval.
admin_dashboard.expiring_empty: No active profiles are expiring within the next 7 days.
admin_dashboard.alert_reject_text: This will deactivate the account. You can delete it later from the Clients page.

admin_clients.title: Client Registry
admin_clients.subtitle: Browse and manage your portal client database, approve registrations, or update payment billing profiles.
admin_clients.search_placeholder: Search by client name or email...
admin_clients.empty_clients: No clients found matching the filters.
admin_clients.new_subtitle: Add a client manually. They will be immediately marked ACTIVE with no admin approval required.
admin_clients.new_card_desc: Saves client and sends custom Supabase invitation email.
admin_clients.edit_subtitle: Configure portal privileges, edit internal notes, or modify default billing data.
admin_clients.edit_card_billing_desc: Review and update invoice template parameters.
admin_clients.edit_notes_placeholder: Add notes about this client (e.g. billing history, proxy requests, etc.)
admin_clients.alert_notes_failed: Failed to save notes. Does the users table have the admin_notes column?

admin_invoices.upload_subtitle: Select client billing details, attach PDF, and verify automated compression optimization.
admin_invoices.card_mapping_desc: Associate this statement file with client orders and subscription dates.
admin_invoices.err_select_client_pdf: Please select a client and attach an invoice PDF.
admin_invoices.err_no_transactions: No transactions recorded for this client.
admin_invoices.alert_delete_text: This will permanently remove the PDF from storage.
admin_invoices.alert_uploaded_text: Invoice has been uploaded and sent to client.
admin_invoices.title: Manual Invoices
admin_invoices.subtitle: Review matching historical files uploaded for client packages.
admin_invoices.search_placeholder: Search by invoice ID, client, file name, or order...
admin_invoices.empty_db: No manual invoices are currently uploaded in the system database.
admin_invoices.empty_filtered: No invoices matching the current filters.

admin_orders.title: Payment Records
admin_orders.subtitle: View and search Stripe transaction history, renewal checks, and billing receipts.
admin_orders.search_placeholder: Search by client, order ID, Stripe session, or service...
admin_orders.card_desc: Complete records of active, failed, and pending checkouts. {{count}} of {{total}} records shown.
admin_orders.empty_filtered: No transactions matching the current filters.

admin_profiles.title: Browser Inventory
admin_profiles.subtitle: Store and track credentials, recovery passwords, and client-assigned profiles from IXBrowser.
admin_profiles.search_placeholder: Search by profile name, email, or IXBrowser ID...
admin_profiles.empty_filtered: No profiles registered matching the filters.
admin_profiles.new_subtitle: Enter target proxy credentials and IXBrowser details manually for client assignments.
admin_profiles.edit_subtitle: Enter target proxy credentials and IXBrowser details manually for client assignments.
admin_profiles.card_credentials_desc: Raw credentials shown to client. Include passwords and recovery keys.
admin_profiles.card_ixbrowser_desc: Copy and paste the exact keys created in your local IXBrowser application.
admin_profiles.card_assignment_desc: Read-only. Use the Assign/Release actions to modify.
admin_profiles.card_assign_desc: Optionally assign this profile to a client directly from here.
admin_profiles.placeholder_admin_notes: Proxy credentials date, speed notes, recovery checks...
admin_profiles.placeholder_client_notes: Specific setup requirements visible in the client dashboard.
admin_profiles.assign_subtitle: Select an active portal client, input subscription expiration dates, and activate the profile.
admin_profiles.card_alloc_desc: Saves mapping and reveals details to client dashboard.
admin_profiles.err_no_active_clients: No active clients available in database. Set pending clients as active first.
admin_profiles.alert_release_text: Credentials will remain in available pool.
admin_profiles.alert_delete_text: You won't be able to revert this!
admin_profiles.alert_delete_disabled_title: Cannot delete assigned profile. Release it first.

admin_services.title: Service Settings
admin_services.subtitle: Configure available browser profile subscription packages, pricing points, and allocation parameters.
admin_services.empty_db: No service plans are currently configured.
admin_services.new_subtitle: Create client subscription options, prices, and dashboard download instructions.
admin_services.edit_subtitle: Create client subscription options, prices, and dashboard download instructions.
admin_services.card_details_desc: Display title, pricing description, and instructions visible on purchase checkout.
admin_services.placeholder_desc: Short description highlighting proxy specs and duration...
admin_services.placeholder_instructions: Provide copy-paste instructions for the user to import this profile into IXBrowser...
admin_services.allocation_desc: Requires manual profile assignment by admin.
admin_services.alert_delete_text: Clients will no longer be able to select it.
